requirement_topic.en: Restricted Substances — No Horizontal RoHS in Singapore vs China RoHS
requirement_topic.zh: 限制物质——新加坡无横向 RoHS vs 中国 RoHS
requirement_topic.zht: 限制物質——新加坡無橫向 RoHS vs 中國 RoHS

summary.en: Singapore does not have a horizontal RoHS-type regulation that broadly restricts hazardous substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, brominated flame retardants, phthalates) across all electrical and electronic equipment in the way the EU RoHS Directive does. There is no economy-wide mandatory restricted-substance list or RoHS Declaration of Conformity requirement as a market-access condition for LED luminaires. Instead, substance control reaches LED products indirectly: (1) any hazardous-substance limits embedded within the applicable product safety standards (e.g. the SS/IEC 60598 or IEC 62560 series, and material/insulation requirements) apply through the SAFETY Mark conformity; (2) general chemical-control and hazardous-substances law administered by NEA governs specific listed hazardous substances and their import/use, but is not a product-level RoHS for finished luminaires; (3) commercial/customer specifications (e.g. EU-RoHS or RoHS-equivalent declarations demanded by buyers) may apply contractually rather than by Singapore law. Mercury-containing lamps are additionally subject to controls reflecting Singapore's commitments under the Minamata Convention.
summary.zh: 新加坡没有像欧盟 RoHS 指令那样在所有电气电子设备中广泛限制有害物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、溴系阻燃剂、邻苯二甲酸酯）的横向 RoHS 类法规。不存在作为 LED 灯具市场准入条件的全经济范围强制限制物质清单或 RoHS 符合性声明要求。物质控制以间接方式触及 LED 产品：（1）适用产品安全标准（如 SS/IEC 60598 或 IEC 62560 系列及材料/绝缘要求）内含的任何有害物质限值，通过 SAFETY 安全标志符合性适用；（2）NEA 管理的一般化学品控制及有害物质法律管理特定列明有害物质及其进口/使用，但并非针对成品灯具的产品级 RoHS；（3）商业/客户规范（如买方要求的欧盟 RoHS 或等效 RoHS 声明）可能以合同方式适用而非新加坡法律。含汞灯具还受反映新加坡《水俣公约》承诺的管控约束。
summary.zht: 新加坡沒有像歐盟 RoHS 指令那樣在所有電氣電子設備中廣泛限制有害物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、溴系阻燃劑、鄰苯二甲酸酯）的橫向 RoHS 類法規。不存在作為 LED 燈具市場准入條件的全經濟範圍強制限制物質清單或 RoHS 符合性聲明要求。物質控制以間接方式觸及 LED 產品：（1）適用產品安全標準（如 SS/IEC 60598 或 IEC 62560 系列及材料/絕緣要求）內含的任何有害物質限值，通過 SAFETY 安全標誌符合性適用；（2）NEA 管理的一般化學品控制及有害物質法律管理特定列明有害物質及其進口/使用，但並非針對成品燈具的產品級 RoHS；（3）商業/客戶規範（如買方要求的歐盟 RoHS 或等效 RoHS 聲明）可能以合同方式適用而非新加坡法律。含汞燈具還受反映新加坡《水俣公約》承諾的管控約束。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal RoHS regulation in Singapore — restricted-substance control is product/standard-driven (SAFETY Mark conformity) and via NEA-administered chemical/hazardous-substances law for specific listed substances
Minamata Convention on Mercury (Singapore is a party) — controls relevant to mercury-containing lamps

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with thresholds equivalent to EU RoHS. China RoHS 2 (Management Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products) and SJ/T 11364-2014 require a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange for above threshold / green for below) on EEE sold in China. China therefore does impose a structured restricted-substance and disclosure-labelling regime that Singapore lacks as a horizontal market-access requirement.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 等效。中国 RoHS 2（电子电气产品有害物质限制使用管理办法）及 SJ/T 11364-2014 要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（超限为橙色/低于限值为绿色）。因此中国确实施加了一套结构化的限制物质及披露标签制度，而新加坡缺乏作为横向市场准入要求的此类制度。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 等效。中國 RoHS 2（電子電氣產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法）及 SJ/T 11364-2014 要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（超限為橙色/低於限值為綠色）。因此中國確實施加了一套結構化的限制物質及披露標籤制度，而新加坡缺乏作為橫向市場准入要求的此類制度。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: This is a notable case where Singapore is less prescriptive than both China and the EU: Singapore has no horizontal RoHS, so there is no Singapore-law obligation to test a finished LED luminaire against a 6- or 10-substance restricted list as a condition of market access. The practical points for a Chinese exporter are: (1) China's own GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364 disclosure-label regime is a CN-side requirement, not something Singapore mirrors — the CN orange/green disclosure mark is not needed on Singapore packaging; (2) restricted-substance expectations reach Singapore products mainly through the safety-standard material requirements (SAFETY Mark) and via buyer contracts, so customers may still demand an EU-RoHS-style declaration commercially; (3) mercury-containing lamps face controls linked to the Minamata Convention; (4) e-waste end-of-life obligations are handled by NEA's EPR scheme (see ledsg-rohs-02), not by a substance-restriction rule. Exporters should clarify with their Singapore buyer/Registered Supplier whether a RoHS-equivalent declaration is required contractually.
gap.zh: 这是新加坡比中国及欧盟均更宽松的显著情形：新加坡无横向 RoHS，因此不存在以将成品 LED 灯具对照 6 项或 10 项限制物质清单检测作为市场准入条件的新加坡法律义务。中国出口商的实际要点：（1）中国自身的 GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364 披露标签制度是中国侧要求，新加坡并不对应——中国橙/绿披露标识在新加坡包装上无需出现；（2）限制物质预期主要通过安全标准材料要求（SAFETY 安全标志）及买方合同触及新加坡产品，因此客户在商业上仍可能要求欧盟 RoHS 式声明；（3）含汞灯具面临与《水俣公约》相关的管控；（4）电子废弃物的报废义务由 NEA 的 EPR 计划处理（见 ledsg-rohs-02），而非物质限制规则。出口商应与其新加坡买方/注册供应商澄清是否在合同上要求 RoHS 等效声明。
gap.zht: 這是新加坡比中國及歐盟均更寬鬆的顯著情形：新加坡無橫向 RoHS，因此不存在以將成品 LED 燈具對照 6 項或 10 項限制物質清單檢測作為市場准入條件的新加坡法律義務。中國出口商的實際要點：（1）中國自身的 GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364 披露標籤制度是中國側要求，新加坡並不對應——中國橙/綠披露標識在新加坡包裝上無需出現；（2）限制物質預期主要通過安全標準材料要求（SAFETY 安全標誌）及買方合同觸及新加坡產品，因此客戶在商業上仍可能要求歐盟 RoHS 式聲明；（3）含汞燈具面臨與《水俁公約》相關的管控；（4）電子廢棄物的報廢義務由 NEA 的 EPR 計劃處理（見 ledsg-rohs-02），而非物質限制規則。出口商應與其新加坡買方/注冊供應商澄清是否在合同上要求 RoHS 等效聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Not a horizontal mandate — Singapore has no economy-wide RoHS; restricted-substance control reaches LED products via safety-standard material requirements (SAFETY Mark), NEA-administered chemical/hazardous-substances law for specific substances, Minamata controls for mercury lamps, and buyer contracts. No RoHS Declaration of Conformity is required by Singapore law for market access.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances

source.publisher: National Environment Agency (NEA), Singapore — chemical safety / hazardous substances

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Singapore has no horizontal RoHS regulation, so there is no Singapore-law requirement to test a finished LED luminaire against a restricted-substance list or to issue a RoHS Declaration of Conformity as a market-access condition. Restricted-substance control is instead product/standard-driven (via the SAFETY Mark safety standards), supplemented by NEA-administered chemical/hazardous-substances law for specific listed substances and Minamata controls for mercury lamps. China's GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364 disclosure-label regime is a CN-side requirement not mirrored in Singapore. Buyers may still require a RoHS-equivalent declaration contractually — clarify this with the Singapore Registered Supplier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新加坡无横向 RoHS 法规，因此不存在以将成品 LED 灯具对照限制物质清单检测或出具 RoHS 符合性声明作为市场准入条件的新加坡法律要求。限制物质控制改为由产品/标准驱动（通过 SAFETY 安全标志安全标准），并辅以 NEA 管理的针对特定列明物质的化学品/有害物质法律及对含汞灯的《水俣公约》管控。中国 GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364 披露标签制度是中国侧要求，新加坡并不对应。买方在商业上仍可能要求 RoHS 等效声明——请与新加坡注册供应商澄清。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新加坡無橫向 RoHS 法規，因此不存在以將成品 LED 燈具對照限制物質清單檢測或出具 RoHS 符合性聲明作為市場准入條件的新加坡法律要求。限制物質控制改為由產品/標準驅動（通過 SAFETY 安全標誌安全標準），並輔以 NEA 管理的針對特定列明物質的化學品/有害物質法律及對含汞燈的《水俁公約》管控。中國 GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364 披露標籤制度是中國側要求，新加坡並不對應。買方在商業上仍可能要求 RoHS 等效聲明——請與新加坡注冊供應商澄清。

requirement_topic.en: E-Waste Extended Producer Responsibility (NEA EPR) vs CN E-Waste Rules
requirement_topic.zh: 电子废弃物生产者延伸责任（NEA EPR）vs 中国电子废弃物规则
requirement_topic.zht: 電子廢棄物生產者延伸責任（NEA EPR）vs 中國電子廢棄物規則

summary.en: Singapore manages the end-of-life of electrical and electronic products, including lamps, through the National Environment Agency's Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) scheme for e-waste under the Resource Sustainability Act. Producers of regulated consumer EEE — including portable/consumer lamps where in scope — must register with NEA as producers, may be required to join or fund a Producer Responsibility Scheme (PRS) operator that collects and recycles end-of-life products, and must meet obligations on take-back, reporting, and (for some categories) free collection. Lamps containing mercury (e.g. legacy fluorescent) and certain lighting products fall within the regulated e-waste categories. This is a producer/importer obligation distinct from product safety (SAFETY Mark) and energy (NEA MELS/MEPS), and it attaches to the party that supplies the product into Singapore.
summary.zh: 新加坡通过国家环境局（NEA）依据《资源永续法》设立的电子废弃物生产者延伸责任（EPR）计划管理电气电子产品（含灯具）的报废。受管制消费类 EEE 的生产者——包括范围内的便携/消费类灯具——须向 NEA 注册为生产者，可能须加入或资助由生产者责任计划（PRS）运营商运作的收集与回收体系，并履行回收、报告以及（对某些类别的）免费收集义务。含汞灯具（如旧式荧光灯）及某些照明产品属于受管制电子废弃物类别。这是有别于产品安全（SAFETY 安全标志）及能效（NEA MELS/MEPS）的生产者/进口商义务，并附属于向新加坡供应产品的一方。
summary.zht: 新加坡通過國家環境局（NEA）依據《資源永續法》設立的電子廢棄物生產者延伸責任（EPR）計劃管理電氣電子產品（含燈具）的報廢。受管制消費類 EEE 的生產者——包括範圍內的便攜/消費類燈具——須向 NEA 注冊為生產者，可能須加入或資助由生產者責任計劃（PRS）運營商運作的收集與回收體系，並履行回收、報告以及（對某些類別的）免費收集義務。含汞燈具（如舊式熒光燈）及某些照明產品屬於受管制電子廢棄物類別。這是有別於產品安全（SAFETY 安全標誌）及能效（NEA MELS/MEPS）的生產者/進口商義務，並附屬於向新加坡供應產品的一方。

standards_or_laws: Resource Sustainability Act (Singapore) — Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) scheme for e-waste, administered by NEA
NEA producer registration and Producer Responsibility Scheme (PRS) obligations for regulated consumer electrical and electronic products (including lamps in scope)

summary.en: China's analogous framework is the Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (WEEE Regulation, State Council) and the associated WEEE treatment fund (the producer-paid fund administered with MEE), together with catalogues of products subject to the fund. Producers of in-scope EEE pay into the fund and qualified dismantling enterprises receive subsidies. The scope, fee levels, registry, and reporting are China-specific and do not satisfy or transfer to Singapore's NEA EPR producer registration and PRS obligations.
summary.zh: 中国的类似框架为《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》（WEEE 条例，国务院）及相关的废弃电器电子产品处理基金（由生产者缴纳、与生态环境部共同管理的基金），并配有缴纳基金的产品目录。范围内 EEE 的生产者向基金缴费，合格拆解企业获得补贴。其范围、费率、注册系统及报告均为中国特有，不满足也不转移至新加坡 NEA EPR 生产者注册及 PRS 义务。
summary.zht: 中國的類似框架為《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》（WEEE 條例，國務院）及相關的廢棄電器電子產品處理基金（由生產者繳納、與生態環境部共同管理的基金），並配有繳納基金的產品目錄。範圍內 EEE 的生產者向基金繳費，合格拆解企業獲得補貼。其範圍、費率、注冊系統及報告均為中國特有，不滿足也不轉移至新加坡 NEA EPR 生產者注冊及 PRS 義務。

standards_or_laws: Regulation on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (China WEEE Regulation, State Council)
WEEE Treatment Fund and product catalogues (China — producer-funded, administered with MEE)

gap.en: Both jurisdictions impose producer-side end-of-life obligations, but the mechanisms differ and neither transfers to the other. For a Chinese exporter selling into Singapore, the operative obligation falls on the party that supplies the product in Singapore (typically the local importer/Registered Supplier), who must: (1) register with NEA as a producer where the lamp/EEE is in scope of the EPR scheme; (2) join or contribute to a PRS operator for collection and recycling; (3) meet reporting and take-back obligations. Key points: (a) China's WEEE-fund payment does not discharge NEA EPR obligations; (b) the NEA producer obligation typically rests with the Singapore-side supplier rather than the overseas factory, so contractual allocation of this responsibility should be agreed; (c) mercury-containing lamps are specifically within the regulated e-waste categories and carry collection expectations. Confirm the current EPR scope and the registered-producer obligations for the specific lamp/luminaire category.
gap.zh: 两个法域均施加生产者侧报废义务，但机制不同且互不转移。对于向新加坡销售的中国出口商，实际义务落在新加坡供应产品的一方（通常为本地进口商/注册供应商），其须：（1）在灯具/EEE 属于 EPR 计划范围时向 NEA 注册为生产者；（2）加入或资助 PRS 运营商进行收集与回收；（3）履行报告及回收义务。要点：（a）中国 WEEE 基金缴费不免除 NEA EPR 义务；（b）NEA 生产者义务通常由新加坡侧供应商承担而非海外工厂，故应就该责任的合同分配达成一致；（c）含汞灯具明确属于受管制电子废弃物类别并附带收集预期。请就具体灯具/灯具类别确认现行 EPR 范围及注册生产者义务。
gap.zht: 兩個法域均施加生產者側報廢義務，但機制不同且互不轉移。對於向新加坡銷售的中國出口商，實際義務落在新加坡供應產品的一方（通常為本地進口商/注冊供應商），其須：（1）在燈具/EEE 屬於 EPR 計劃範圍時向 NEA 注冊為生產者；（2）加入或資助 PRS 運營商進行收集與回收；（3）履行報告及回收義務。要點：（a）中國 WEEE 基金繳費不免除 NEA EPR 義務；（b）NEA 生產者義務通常由新加坡側供應商承擔而非海外工廠，故應就該責任的合同分配達成一致；（c）含汞燈具明確屬於受管制電子廢棄物類別並附帶收集預期。請就具體燈具/燈具類別確認現行 EPR 範圍及注冊生產者義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — producers/importers of regulated consumer EEE (including lamps in scope) must register with NEA and meet EPR / PRS obligations under the Resource Sustainability Act. The obligation rests with the party supplying the product in Singapore.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where in scope — producers of catalogued EEE pay into the China WEEE Treatment Fund under the WEEE Regulation

source.publisher: National Environment Agency (NEA), Singapore — e-waste management / EPR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Singapore handles restricted-substance/e-waste end-of-life through NEA's Extended Producer Responsibility scheme under the Resource Sustainability Act, requiring producers/importers of in-scope consumer EEE (including lamps) to register with NEA and meet PRS collection, recycling and reporting obligations. China's WEEE-fund framework is analogous but does not transfer, and the NEA obligation typically rests with the Singapore-side supplier rather than the overseas factory. Mercury-containing lamps are specifically in scope. Confirm the current EPR scope and registered-producer obligations for the specific lamp/luminaire and allocate the responsibility contractually with the Singapore supplier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新加坡通过 NEA 依据《资源永续法》设立的生产者延伸责任计划处理限制物质/电子废弃物的报废，要求范围内消费类 EEE（含灯具）的生产者/进口商向 NEA 注册并履行 PRS 收集、回收及报告义务。中国 WEEE 基金框架与之类似但不转移，且 NEA 义务通常由新加坡侧供应商而非海外工厂承担。含汞灯具明确在范围内。请就具体灯具确认现行 EPR 范围及注册生产者义务，并与新加坡供应商以合同分配该责任。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新加坡通過 NEA 依據《資源永續法》設立的生產者延伸責任計劃處理限制物質/電子廢棄物的報廢，要求範圍內消費類 EEE（含燈具）的生產者/進口商向 NEA 注冊並履行 PRS 收集、回收及報告義務。中國 WEEE 基金框架與之類似但不轉移，且 NEA 義務通常由新加坡側供應商而非海外工廠承擔。含汞燈具明確在範圍內。請就具體燈具確認現行 EPR 範圍及注冊生產者義務，並與新加坡供應商以合同分配該責任。

requirement_topic.en: Overall Market-Access Process and Documentation vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 整体市场准入流程与文件 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 整體市場准入流程與文件 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Bringing an LED luminaire or lamp to the Singapore market involves coordinating several distinct regulators rather than a single CE-style declaration: (1) Enterprise Singapore — for Controlled Goods, register the product under the CPS scheme and affix the SAFETY Mark, with a Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier holding the registration and a CAB test report demonstrating SS/IEC safety conformity; (2) IMDA — register any wireless function under the Equipment Registration Framework before supply; (3) NEA — for regulated lamps, complete MEPS/MELS energy registration and apply the Singapore Energy Label, and meet e-waste EPR producer obligations. There is no single combined Declaration of Conformity; instead each regulator has its own registration, evidence and marking. A local Singapore entity is generally needed to hold the SAFETY Mark registration and to act as producer for NEA EPR purposes. Product information and labels should be in English.
summary.zh: 将 LED 灯具或灯泡引入新加坡市场需要协调若干不同监管机构，而非单一的 CE 式声明：（1）企业发展局——对于受控货品，在 CPS 计划下注册产品并加贴 SAFETY 安全标志，由在新加坡注册成立的注册供应商持有注册，并以 CAB 检测报告证明 SS/IEC 安全符合性；（2）IMDA——供应前就任何无线功能在设备注册框架下注册；（3）NEA——对于受管制灯具，完成 MEPS/MELS 能效注册并加贴新加坡能源标签，并履行电子废弃物 EPR 生产者义务。不存在单一合并的符合性声明；各监管机构均有各自的注册、证据及标识。通常需要一家本地新加坡实体持有 SAFETY 安全标志注册并作为 NEA EPR 的生产者。产品信息及标签应以英文提供。
summary.zht: 將 LED 燈具或燈泡引入新加坡市場需要協調若干不同監管機構，而非單一的 CE 式聲明：（1）企業發展局——對於受控貨品，在 CPS 計劃下注冊產品並加貼 SAFETY 安全標誌，由在新加坡注冊成立的注冊供應商持有注冊，並以 CAB 檢測報告證明 SS/IEC 安全符合性；（2）IMDA——供應前就任何無線功能在設備注冊框架下注冊；（3）NEA——對於受管制燈具，完成 MEPS/MELS 能效注冊並加貼新加坡能源標籤，並履行電子廢棄物 EPR 生產者義務。不存在單一合並的符合性聲明；各監管機構均有各自的注冊、證據及標識。通常需要一家本地新加坡實體持有 SAFETY 安全標誌注冊並作為 NEA EPR 的生產者。產品信息及標籤應以英文提供。

standards_or_laws: Enterprise Singapore CPS scheme / SAFETY Mark — Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations
IMDA Equipment Registration Framework — for wireless functions
NEA MEPS / MELS energy registration and Resource Sustainability Act EPR — for regulated lamps and e-waste

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and certified by CNCA-authorized bodies such as CQC. CQC voluntary certification is available for products outside mandatory CCC. Energy efficiency uses the China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255. Wireless modules require SRRC type approval. End-of-life is handled under the China WEEE Regulation/fund. These are China-domestic schemes with their own registries and marks; none are recognised for Singapore market access, and there is no mutual recognition between CCC/CQC and the Singapore SAFETY Mark.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理并由 CQC 等 CNCA 授权机构认证。对于非强制 CCC 范畴的产品，CQC 自愿性认证亦可申请。能效采用 GB 30255 下的中国能效标识（CEL）。无线电模块须取得 SRRC 型号核准。报废依据中国 WEEE 条例/基金处理。上述均为中国国内方案，各有注册系统及标识；任何均不被新加坡市场准入认可，CCC/CQC 与新加坡 SAFETY 安全标志之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理並由 CQC 等 CNCA 授權機構認證。對於非強制 CCC 範疇的產品，CQC 自願性認證亦可申請。能效採用 GB 30255 下的中國能效標識（CEL）。無線電模組須取得 SRRC 型號核准。報廢依據中國 WEEE 條例/基金處理。上述均為中國國內方案，各有注冊系統及標識；任何均不被新加坡市場准入認可，CCC/CQC 與新加坡 SAFETY 安全標誌之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
China Energy Label (GB 30255), SRRC type approval, China WEEE Regulation — parallel CN-domestic schemes

gap.en: The structural gap is that Singapore market access is multi-regulator and modular (Enterprise Singapore + IMDA + NEA), whereas a Chinese exporter is accustomed to CCC as the central mandatory gate plus separate SRRC/CEL. Key differences with no CN equivalent: (1) a Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier must hold the SAFETY Mark registration — the Chinese factory cannot self-register, unlike holding a CCC certificate directly; (2) there is no single combined Declaration of Conformity — each of safety, radio, and energy is registered separately with its own evidence and mark; (3) the SAFETY Mark, IMDA registration label, and Singapore Energy Label are Singapore-specific marks absent from CN-spec product/packaging; (4) CCC certificates and CN test reports are not automatically accepted — confirm whether the test laboratory's reports are recognised by each Singapore scheme, otherwise re-testing to SS/IEC editions is needed; (5) documentation and labels should be in English. Plan the local Registered Supplier, the per-regulator registrations, and the English labelling early, and verify the current Controlled Goods list, IMDA scope, and NEA MEPS/MELS/EPR scope for the specific product.
gap.zh: 结构性差距在于新加坡市场准入是多监管机构、模块化的（企业发展局 + IMDA + NEA），而中国出口商习惯以 CCC 为核心强制门槛并辅以独立的 SRRC/CEL。无中国对应的主要差异：（1）SAFETY 安全标志注册须由在新加坡注册成立的注册供应商持有——中国工厂不能自行注册，不同于直接持有 CCC 证书；（2）不存在单一合并的符合性声明——安全、无线电、能效各自单独注册并具备各自的证据及标识；（3）SAFETY 安全标志、IMDA 注册标签及新加坡能源标签为中国规格产品/包装所没有的新加坡特有标识；（4）CCC 证书及中国检测报告不自动被接受——须确认检测实验室的报告是否被各新加坡计划认可，否则需按 SS/IEC 版本重新检测；（5）文件及标签应以英文提供。请尽早规划本地注册供应商、各监管机构注册及英文标签，并就具体产品核查现行受控货品清单、IMDA 范围及 NEA MEPS/MELS/EPR 范围。
gap.zht: 結構性差距在於新加坡市場准入是多監管機構、模塊化的（企業發展局 + IMDA + NEA），而中國出口商習慣以 CCC 為核心強制門檻並輔以獨立的 SRRC/CEL。無中國對應的主要差異：（1）SAFETY 安全標誌注冊須由在新加坡注冊成立的注冊供應商持有——中國工廠不能自行注冊，不同於直接持有 CCC 證書；（2）不存在單一合並的符合性聲明——安全、無線電、能效各自單獨注冊並具備各自的證據及標識；（3）SAFETY 安全標誌、IMDA 注冊標籤及新加坡能源標籤為中國規格產品/包裝所沒有的新加坡特有標識；（4）CCC 證書及中國檢測報告不自動被接受——須確認檢測實驗室的報告是否被各新加坡計劃認可，否則需按 SS/IEC 版本重新檢測；（5）文件及標籤應以英文提供。請盡早規劃本地注冊供應商、各監管機構注冊及英文標籤，並就具體產品核查現行受控貨品清單、IMDA 範圍及 NEA MEPS/MELS/EPR 範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (modular) — Singapore market access requires the applicable per-regulator registrations and marks (SAFETY Mark via Enterprise Singapore where Controlled; IMDA for wireless; NEA energy and EPR for regulated lamps), held/supported by a Singapore-incorporated local entity. No single combined Declaration of Conformity.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC, CEL and WEEE obligations apply separately

source.publisher: Enterprise Singapore — Consumer Product Safety Office / SAFETY Mark scheme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Singapore market access for LED luminaires is multi-regulator and modular — Enterprise Singapore (SAFETY Mark for Controlled Goods), IMDA (wireless registration), and NEA (energy MEPS/MELS and e-waste EPR) — with no single combined Declaration of Conformity. A Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier/local entity is generally required, and the SAFETY Mark, IMDA label and Singapore Energy Label are Singapore-specific marks. Chinese CCC/CQC, SRRC, CEL and WEEE compliance do not transfer and are not mutually recognised; confirm whether test reports are accepted by each scheme, otherwise re-test to SS/IEC editions. Plan the local supplier, per-regulator registrations and English labelling early, and verify current scope for the specific product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新加坡 LED 灯具市场准入是多监管机构、模块化的——企业发展局（受控货品 SAFETY 安全标志）、IMDA（无线注册）及 NEA（能效 MEPS/MELS 及电子废弃物 EPR）——且不存在单一合并的符合性声明。通常需要一家在新加坡注册成立的注册供应商/本地实体，且 SAFETY 安全标志、IMDA 标签及新加坡能源标签为新加坡特有标识。中国 CCC/CQC、SRRC、CEL 及 WEEE 合规不转移且不互认；请确认检测报告是否被各计划接受，否则须按 SS/IEC 版本重新检测。请尽早规划本地供应商、各监管机构注册及英文标签，并就具体产品核查现行适用范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新加坡 LED 燈具市場准入是多監管機構、模塊化的——企業發展局（受控貨品 SAFETY 安全標誌）、IMDA（無線注冊）及 NEA（能效 MEPS/MELS 及電子廢棄物 EPR）——且不存在單一合並的符合性聲明。通常需要一家在新加坡注冊成立的注冊供應商/本地實體，且 SAFETY 安全標誌、IMDA 標籤及新加坡能源標籤為新加坡特有標識。中國 CCC/CQC、SRRC、CEL 及 WEEE 合規不轉移且不互認；請確認檢測報告是否被各計劃接受，否則須按 SS/IEC 版本重新檢測。請盡早規劃本地供應商、各監管機構注冊及英文標籤，並就具體產品核查現行適用範圍。
